# Change Summary

Please provide a clear and concise description of the changes you have made. Add issue references if applicable.
- Jira: 
- GitHub Issue: 

## Base Branch Assertion

Ensure you are targeting the appropriate branch for your changes:

- [ ] **Feature branch:** targets `develop`
- [ ] **Release branch:** targets `main` and then back-merges to `develop`
- [ ] **Hotfix branch:** targets `main` and then syncs back to `develop`

## Git Flow Branch Type Assertion

Confirm that your branch type matches your changes:

- [ ] `feature/*` branch
- [ ] `release/*` branch
- [ ] `hotfix/*` branch

## Test Evidence

Please describe how you've tested these changes and provide evidence.

- [ ] Unit tests pass
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] Manual verification completed (provide details)

## Governance Checklist

Before requesting a review, ensure the following policies are met to align with our governance controls:

- [ ] **External Approval Required:** I acknowledge that my code must receive at least one approval from a designated reviewer before merging.
- [ ] **Stale Approvals:** I will ensure to re-request reviews if new commits are added to this pull request.
- [ ] **Conventional Commit Compliant:** My PR title correctly conforms to the [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/en/v1.0.0/) standard.
